title: Piano Teacher
description:
Piano Teacher – Full-Time, Permanent

5-Day Work Week | 2 Days Off


Why Join LVL Music Academy?

  • Singapore’s first all-in-one music hub: music school, instrument shop, and in-house repair workshop under one roof
  • Specialising in string instruments (violin, cello & piano) for students of all ages
  • Supportive, inspiring, and professional environment where teachers and students thrive

About the Role

LVL Music Academy is seeking a passionate and experienced Piano Teacher to deliver high-quality music instruction and nurture students’ musical development. The ideal candidate will have strong organisational and teaching skills, deep product knowledge, and a love for music education, capable of promoting LVL’s services and programs effectively.


Your Role:

  • Deliver engaging piano lessons to students aged 3.5 years to adults, tailored to individual learning needs.
  • Plan, prepare, and execute structured lesson plans to ensure consistent progress
  • Follow LVL's cirriculum and guides (full training will be provided)
  • Teach music theory (ABRSM) and prepare students for examinations.
  • Organise and manage recitals and performance opportunities to showcase student achievements.
  • Maintain clear, proactive communication with students and parents to support learning outcomes.
  • Collaborate with fellow teaching staff to enhance curriculum and student experience.

What We’re Looking For:

  • Minimum Diploma in Music, with a degree preferred.
  • At least 2 years of teaching experience, with a proven track record in piano instruction.
  • Proficient in teaching both practical piano skills and music theory to students of all ages.
  • Strong organisational skills with the ability to plan and oversee recitals.
  • Collaborative, positive, and passionate about nurturing students’ musical journeys.

Perks and Packages

  • Base Salary: $4,200 – $5,000 per month
  • Medical and Insurance Coverage (Hospital & Surgical)
  • 14 Days Annual Leave & Sick Leave
  • In-House Learning, Development, and Training
  • Professional Career Development Opportunities
  • Complimentary Music Lessons
  • Vibrant and Supportive Company Culture
  • Opportunity to travel overseas with the team for annual performances
  • Performance incentives and continuous training opportunities

About LVL Music Academy

Founded in 2013, LVL is Singapore’s leading music school and instrument shop, specialising in string instruments (violin, cello & piano). We are the first music hub in Singapore to combine a music school, instrument shop, and in-house repair workshop under the same roof, providing students, parents, and musicians with a truly comprehensive music experience.

Ready to Inspire the Next Generation of Musicians?
Submit your resume and cover letter now!

postedCompany.description: LVL Music Academy is a premier destination for violin, cello , piano lessons and fine musical instruments and accessories. We take pride in our extensive collection of violins, cellos, and accessories, offering musicians and enthusiasts the finest quality products.
postedCompany.name: LVL MUSIC ACADEMY PTE. LTD.
